community_notes.excerpt: r/IntoTheBreach search results include daily discussions for Blob and Blobber; snippets corroborate that Alpha Blobs are spawned by Alpha Blobbers and can be baited or stopped with smoke/freeze.

Steam search did not surface a direct Alpha Blob thread in the fetched page, but a related Into the Breach targeting discussion notes that Blobbers and Spiders often place spawned units where they affect multiple targets.
